hero.description: SICNAF specializes in the installation of skips, containers, repair and maintenance of your industrial equipment. Fast, reliable, professional.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A complete range of industrial services to meet all your needs.

steps.title: How does it work?
steps.s1_desc: Fill out our online form with your needs.
steps.s2_desc: We analyze your request and prepare a detailed quote.
steps.s3_desc: Our technicians intervene according to the agreed schedule.
steps.s4_desc: Receive your clear and detailed invoice.

cta.title: Need a quick intervention?
cta.desc: Our team intervenes within 48 hours on your site. Free and non-binding quote.

devis.title: Quote Request
devis.subtitle: Fill in the form below. We will contact you within 24 hours.
devis.success_desc: Your request has been received. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
